top_tweets.text: Noticing there’s a renewed interest in paper and cardboard cutouts in visual culture lately (whether through the actual materials or imitations) that’s tied to the shift towards emphasizing human craft and analog tactility in design. https://t.co/8bKr4ZkQpK
top_tweets.author: dearvotion
top_tweets.name: N
top_tweets.summary_zh: 觀察到視覺文化近期重新興起對紙張與硬紙板剪貼的興趣（不論真實材質或模擬），反映設計趨勢正轉向強調人工手作與類比質感的觸覺性。

top_tweets.text:

The HTML is wild. It has all the street names, their https://t.co/ter6pjjSl0
